name: openboa
description: Business of Agents runtime with a chat-first shipping wedge

scripts.dev:desktop: pnpm build && pnpm build:web && pnpm exec electron .
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm rebuild electron electron-winstaller && pnpm build && pnpm build:web && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac zip --publish never
scripts.lint: biome check --files-ignore-unknown=true src test scripts .github/workflows biome.json package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:chat: vitest run test/chat-app-state.test.ts test/chat-app.test.tsx test/chat-command-service.test.ts test/chat-context-builder.test.ts test/chat-global-bar.test.ts test/chat-import-boundary.test.ts test/chat-ledger.test.ts test/chat-legacy-naming.test.ts test/chat-message-row.test.tsx test/chat-mobile-nav.test.tsx test/chat-open-flow.test.ts test/chat-projections.test.ts test/chat-shell-frame.test.ts test/chat-sidebar.test.tsx test/chat-standalone-app.test.tsx test/chat-thread-pane.test.tsx test/chat-transcript-pane.test.tsx test/conversation-service.test.ts test/index.test.ts test/shell-chat-import-boundary.test.ts test/web-chat-import-boundary.test.ts test/company-shell-web.test.ts
scripts.check:chat: node scripts/check-chat-boundary.mjs && node scripts/check-shell-chat-boundary.mjs && node scripts/check-web-chat-boundary.mjs && node scripts/check-chat-legacy-naming.mjs && pnpm exec biome check src/chat src/shell/chat src/shell/web/ChatApp.tsx src/shell/web/ChatStandaloneApp.tsx src/shell/web/chat src/shell/web/chat-app-state.ts src/shell/web/chat-seed.ts src/shell/web/components/chat src/shell/web/components/chrome/global-bar.tsx src/shell/web/demo-shell.ts src/shell/web/frame-state.ts test/chat-app-state.test.ts test/chat-app.test.tsx test/chat-command-service.test.ts test/chat-context-builder.test.ts test/chat-global-bar.test.ts test/chat-import-boundary.test.ts test/chat-ledger.test.ts test/chat-legacy-naming.test.ts test/chat-message-row.test.tsx test/chat-mobile-nav.test.tsx test/chat-open-flow.test.ts test/chat-projections.test.ts test/chat-shell-frame.test.ts test/chat-sidebar.test.tsx test/chat-standalone-app.test.tsx test/chat-thread-pane.test.tsx test/chat-transcript-pane.test.tsx test/conversation-service.test.ts test/index.test.ts test/shell-chat-import-boundary.test.ts test/web-chat-import-boundary.test.ts test/company-shell-web.test.ts scripts/check-chat-boundary.mjs scripts/check-shell-chat-boundary.mjs scripts/check-web-chat-boundary.mjs scripts/check-chat-legacy-naming.mjs vite.config.ts package.json tsconfig.chat.json && pnpm run typecheck:chat && pnpm build:web && pnpm test:chat
scripts.format: biome format --write --files-ignore-unknown=true src test scripts .github/workflows biome.json package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.format:check: biome format --files-ignore-unknown=true src test scripts .github/workflows biome.json package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.precommit:check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm check:policy && pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build:web && pnpm test
